chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR. Const. Petition No. S- 62 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE Fresh case. 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on CMA 224/2024 (Ex) 3. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2025. None is present on behalf of petitioner, same was position on 24.05.2024, 04.10.2024 and 31.01.2025. Trial Court has submitted report, the contents whereof are re-produced as under:- “ With reverence, reference to the captioned, the report as required is encased that the report in above mentioned matter has already been submitted on 22.05.2024 (copy annexed). It is submitted that matter as cited above has already been decreed vide Judgment and decree dated 21.05.2022, thereafter plaintiff/D.H filed Execution Application No.16/2022 which was allowed vide order dated 09.12.2023 and same is fixed on 08.06.2024 for compliance.” In view of above, purpose of petition has been served, therefore instant constitution petition is disposed of. JUDGE Irfan/PA 2
